user.title: Configure DDSU666 power meter
user.description: Enter the Modbus TCP gateway address and meter slave ID.

data_description.host: IP address of the Modbus TCP gateway (e.g. 172.16.33.254)
data_description.slave: Slave/unit ID of the meter on the bus (default 1)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the gateway. Check IP, port, and slave address.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid host (IP address).

errors.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the gateway. Check IP, port, and slave address.
errors.invalid_host: Please enter a valid host (IP address).

init.title: Configure DDSU666 connection
init.description: Change the Modbus TCP gateway, slave address, or register addresses (for different meter variants).

data_description.host: IP address of the Modbus TCP gateway
data_description.reg_u: Modbus start address for voltage (e.g. 8192 for 0x2000). Leave default if unsure.
data_description.reg_i: Modbus start address for current (e.g. 8194 for 0x2002).
data_description.reg_p: Modbus start address for active power (e.g. 8196 for 0x2004).
data_description.reg_q: Modbus start address for reactive power (e.g. 8198 for 0x2006).
data_description.reg_s: Modbus start address for apparent power (e.g. 8200 for 0x2008).
data_description.reg_pf: Modbus start address for power factor (e.g. 8202 for 0x200A).
data_description.reg_freq: Modbus start address for frequency (e.g. 8206 for 0x200E).
data_description.reg_impep: Modbus start address for total active energy (e.g. 16384 for 0x4000).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check IP, port, and slave address.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid host (IP address).
